items.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
items.dek: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.
items.body: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: EU decides on key €90bn Ukraine loan after pipeline deadlock ends
items.dek: The funding was agreed last December, but it has been held up in a row over Russian oil supplies to Hungary.
items.body: The funding was agreed last December, but it has been held up in a row over Russian oil supplies to Hungary.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Korean fighter jets collided due to pilots snapping pictures, report finds
items.dek: One of the pilots has been fined thousands of dollars by the military to cover repair costs.
items.body: One of the pilots has been fined thousands of dollars by the military to cover repair costs.
items.author: IriLine Desk
